company.description: Online accounting and tax filing service provider for small businesses, offering company accounts preparation, tax return filing, and compliance services.

business_model.pricing_model: Fixed pricing for services (e.g., £399 for Company Accounts & Tax Return)

market_intelligence.market_position: Leading online accounting service provider for small businesses in the UK

news.title: Debitam - Online Account Filing
news.summary:
Debitam, as a word in Latin, translates into English as “due”.
What we started as Online Account Filing 5 years ago, we rebranded ourselves as Debitam last year.
Being a unique and strongly tied term with the nature of our company filing service, we choose Debitam as our new name as a reminder of the fact that we will never let your company filings go overdue.
We pride ourselves with our meticulous tax filing reminding service and with protecting you from paying late filing penalties to Companies House and HMRC in the last 5 years, every day.
Meet the team, find out more about DEBITEM, give us a call, or just go on our website to read our blog.

news.title: Formation of a company - Beginners Guide
news.summary:
Does it help to build up a picture of the intensity of company formation in the UK?
If you think limited company formation works well for your business here is a guide to the steps involved in new company formation.
Also, the name needs to be appropriately included in all the company’s documents, publicity, letters, website, etc.
The director of a company is responsible for running and carrying out the administration tasks of the company.
To be a director of the company, the following conditions need to be met: The person should be over 16 years of age Should not be disqualified to be a director Company Secretary A public limited company needs to appoint a company secretary while private companies have no such obligation by law.

news.summary: What do we do You are already too busy with the daily grind as a business owner, what you need is an accountant who's prompt and reliable and can set you ready for the next step by making use of clear and business-focused language without paperwork faff, in other words, we do online accounting

news.title: Company accounts and tax return filing for small businesses
news.summary:
Accounts Filing Account filing is crucial for a business to avoid any penalty from Companies House and HMRC.
Same day Company Account & Tax Return filing services Avoid late filing penalties that start from £150 per month!
We file your accounts on the same day for a nominal extra cost!
Our team of experts make use of the latest financial technology to make sure you meet the deadline in time.
This service is particularly beneficial to avoid any penalties by Companies or HMRC.

news.title: #accounting #smeuk #corporationtax
news.summary:
What actually causes problems later: • Transactions posted to the wrong accounts • Director payments not clearly labelled • VAT returns filed without a proper review • Balance sheet figures never questioned Individually, these feel minor.
Clean bookkeeping isn’t about perfection.
If you’re a director, ask yourself one thing: Would your numbers still make sense if HMRC asked questions tomorrow?
#UKBusiness #LimitedCompany #Bookkeeping #Xero #Accounting Good tax hygiene starts with clean books.
Being a company director isn’t just about calling the shots — it comes with real legal duties and financial responsibilities.

ai_insights.summary: Debitam is a growing online accounting service provider with a strong focus on small business compliance and tax filing. The company has shown significant growth, with a 100% increase in sales and clients in 2022. They operate primarily in the UK market with a digital-first approach.
